name: oap-email
description: Ask about your email, reply to messages, send new emails, or manage your inbox. Questions: 'anything urgent today?', 'emails from Amy', 'what came in overnight?'. Send: 'reply to that email saying I\'ll call tomorrow', 'send an email to joe@example.com about the invoice'. Manager: 'run the email manager', 'always archive @medium.com', 'unsubscribe from @retailer.com'. Sender preferences: 'always treat @facebook.com as noise'.

input.description: Use action='ask' for questions, 'reply' to reply to a message, 'send' to compose a new email, 'manage' for autonomous inbox management.

action.description: ask, reply, send, manage, mailing_lists, preferences_add, preferences_list, preferences_remove, manager_log, relationships_list, drafts_list, drafts_approve, drafts_reject, drafts_send

question.description: For ask — natural language question about email.

id.description: For reply — the message ID to reply to (from a previous ask/list result).

body.description: For reply or send — the message body text.

manager_action.description: For preferences_add — what to do: archive, unsubscribe, ignore, flag, draft_reply

output.description: For ask: messages with sender, subject, priority, snippet. For manage: summary of actions taken. For preferences/log/drafts: respective lists.
